description: Standing cofounder-eye LLM-judgment leaf (PROTOTYPE): briefs itself from specs/tech/scalability.md (the stated scaling plan and its explicit assumptions) then judges the architecture AS BUILT against it — has the code drifted from the plan, has a known-nonscalable query become an unmitigated hotspot, or does a current design choice paint us into a corner that's painful to undo later? Not a load test; a first-principles architectural read. MILESTONE-AWARE: scaling concerns rarely block ordinary development, so each finding declares the lowest milestone rung by which it must be addressed; the harness gates relative to milestone.json's current rung.
